description_long: This is a white low-top sneaker with three black stripes on each side, characteristic of Adidas Superstar shoes. The upper is made of leather with visible stitching and perforations near the toe area for breathability. The shoe features a rounded rubber shell toe, grayish-white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern, and a slightly yellowed, textured rubber sole showing signs of dirt and wear. The heel tab is black with a white Adidas trefoil logo, and the side panel includes gold 'Superstar' branding. The interior is lined with a soft, light gray fabric, and the overall appearance suggests regular use in urban environments. Scuff marks, creases, and some discoloration are visible, especially on the sole and toe cap.
description: A white Adidas Superstar sneaker with black stripes, a rubber shell toe, and visible signs of wear and dirt. The shoe features a black heel tab with a white Adidas logo and gold 'Superstar' branding on the side.
description_view_0: Left side view showing three black stripes, gold 'Superstar' branding, and visible wear on the white leather and sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded rubber shell toe, criss-cross lacing, and dirt accumulation on the toe cap.
description_view_2: Right side view with three black stripes, no gold branding, and visible creases and scuff marks on the leather.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the black heel tab with a white Adidas trefoil logo and the seam running down the heel.
attribute_logo: White Adidas trefoil logo on black heel tab
